items.name: Cracked Idol
items.description: A palm-sized clay figure of a forgotten war god, split down the middle by age and neglect. Sand still clings to its base from the ruin where it was unearthed.
items.special_effect: Grants the bearer faint whispers of the dead, slightly improving awareness in battle.

items.name: Dusty Talisman
items.description: A leather pouch stuffed with graveyard dust and a sliver of iron. It was sewn shut by a blind priestess who charged three lives for her labor.
items.special_effect: Absorbs a fraction of incoming curse energy, reducing debuff duration slightly.

items.name: Worn Signet
items.description: A ring so old its crest has been worn smooth by centuries of nervous thumbing. Whatever house it once represented has long since been erased from history.
items.special_effect: The wearer's first strike in combat carries a trace of ancestral fury, landing with slightly more force.

items.name: Hollow Tooth Relic
items.description: A molar from an unknown beast, hollowed out and filled with dried venom. Expedition scouts carry it as a last resort, cracking it between their teeth when cornered.
items.special_effect: When the bearer falls below half health, a faint toxic aura discourages enemies from pressing their attack.

items.name: Serpent Fang
items.description: A curved fang the length of a dagger, pulled from a great sand serpent that terrorized a desert trade route. Venom still beads at its tip in dry weather.
items.special_effect: Attacks have a small chance to apply a venom that saps the enemy's strength over time.

items.name: Stone of Vigor
items.description: A river stone inscribed with spiraling glyphs that pulse with a dull green light. Holding it floods the body with unnatural stamina, though exhaustion strikes twice as hard once released.
items.special_effect: Slowly regenerates a small amount of health between combat encounters.

items.name: Wolf Pelt Cloak
items.description: The hide of a dire wolf slain in the northern wastes, still carrying the beast's musk. Those who drape it over their shoulders feel a predatory confidence settle into their bones.
items.special_effect: Intimidates weaker opponents, occasionally causing them to hesitate at the start of combat.

items.name: Iron Crow Fetish
items.description: A crude bird shape hammered from scrap iron by a half-mad expedition smith. Crows gather wherever it is carried, and the dead seem slower to rot in its presence.
items.special_effect: Scavenged loot from defeated foes is slightly more plentiful, as if the crows bring offerings.

items.name: Eye of the Storm
items.description: A sphere of compressed air trapped in volcanic glass. Lightning flickers inside it endlessly, and those who hold it feel static crawl across their skin like living armor.
items.special_effect: Periodically discharges a bolt of captured lightning, stunning a nearby enemy for a brief moment.

items.name: Frozen Heart
items.description: A fist-sized chunk of ice that never melts, recovered from the chest cavity of a frost giant's corpse. It radiates a bitter cold that numbs pain and slows bleeding.
items.special_effect: Encases the bearer in a thin layer of frost when struck, reducing damage from the next incoming blow.

items.name: War Banner
items.description: A tattered strip of silk from a legion standard that led ten thousand men to their deaths. The bloodstains form patterns that shift like a map of battles yet to come.
items.special_effect: Nearby allies gain a surge of morale, slightly increasing their attack and defense in group encounters.

items.name: Plague Doctor's Lens
items.description: A cracked monocle of dark red glass once worn by a physician who catalogued a hundred plagues. Through it, the bearer can see disease and weakness as glowing threads in the air.
items.special_effect: Reveals enemy vulnerabilities, granting a small chance to deal critical damage on each strike.

items.name: Soul Lantern
items.description: A lantern of black iron whose flame burns without fuel. Each soul claimed in its light adds a flicker, and the oldest flames inside are said to scream when the wind shifts.
items.special_effect: Harvests a fragment of essence from each fallen foe, converting it into a temporary boost to all stats.

items.name: Titan's Finger
items.description: A petrified digit the size of a forearm, severed from a colossus that once straddled a mountain pass. Veins of molten gold still thread through the stone, pulsing with ancient power.
items.special_effect: Grants the bearer the fortitude of a titan, dramatically reducing knockback and stagger from heavy blows.

items.name: Eclipse Shard
items.description: A sliver of darkness that fell from the sky during a total eclipse. It absorbs light around it, leaving the bearer shrouded in a perpetual twilight that unnerves all who look upon them.
items.special_effect: Cloaks the bearer in shadow, increasing evasion and granting a chance to dodge attacks entirely.

items.name: Wailing Skull
items.description: A child-sized skull of unknown origin that emits a low, unending moan. Its eye sockets glow with a sickly amber light, and those who carry it too long begin to hear words in the wail.
items.special_effect: Emits a psychic wail at the start of combat, lowering all enemies' defense for the opening exchange.

items.name: Heart of the Colossus
items.description: A fist-sized gemstone that beats like a living organ, recovered from the core of a shattered war golem. Holding it fills the chest with a drumming so powerful it drowns out fear.
items.special_effect: Once per battle, fully absorbs a killing blow and restores the bearer to fighting condition with a burst of stone-hard resolve.

items.name: Abyssal Crown
items.description: A diadem of living shadow that hovers just above the skull. It was dredged from a bottomless chasm, and the darkness it radiates swallows torchlight and hope in equal measure.
items.special_effect: Commands abyssal authority over the battlefield, causing weaker enemies to flee and stronger ones to fight with diminished conviction.

items.name: Ember of Creation
items.description: A shard of primordial fire that predates the world itself. It floats above the bearer's palm, too hot to touch yet never burning, and the air around it smells of newborn stone.
items.special_effect: Continuously mends the bearer's wounds with primordial flame, providing steady health regeneration throughout combat.

items.name: Doom Bell
items.description: A palm-sized bronze bell with no clapper, yet it rings of its own accord when death is near. It was pried from the altar of a ruined temple where an entire priesthood was sacrificed in a single night.
items.special_effect: Tolls an ominous knell when the bearer's health drops low, unleashing a shockwave that damages and staggers all nearby foes.
